panels.title: Projected kWh — Next Month
panels.description: Based on 3-month historical average per zone

targets.rawSql: SELECT NOW() AS time, ROUND(AVG(monthly_kwh), 0) AS value FROM (SELECT date_trunc('month', time) AS month, SUM(energy_kwh) AS monthly_kwh FROM meter_readings WHERE time > NOW() - INTERVAL '90 days' GROUP BY 1) sub

SELECT NOW() AS time, ROUND(AVG(monthly_kwh) * 0.454, 0) AS value FROM (SELECT date_trunc('month', time) AS month, SUM(energy_kwh) AS monthly_kwh FROM meter_readings WHERE time > NOW() - INTERVAL '90 days' GROUP BY 1) sub

SELECT NOW() AS time, ROUND(AVG(monthly_kwh) * 0.585, 0) AS value FROM (SELECT date_trunc('month', time) AS month, SUM(energy_kwh) AS monthly_kwh FROM meter_readings WHERE time > NOW() - INTERVAL '90 days' GROUP BY 1) sub
SELECT date_trunc('month', time) AS time, SUM(energy_kwh) AS "Actual kWh" FROM meter_readings WHERE time <= NOW() GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT zone_name AS "Zone", ROUND(AVG(monthly_kwh), 0) AS "Projected kWh", ROUND(AVG(monthly_kwh) * 0.454, 2) AS "Projected Cost (RM)", ROUND(AVG(monthly_kwh) * 0.585, 0) AS "Projected CO₂ (kg)" FROM (SELECT zone_name, date_trunc('month', time) AS month, SUM(energy_kwh) AS monthly_kwh FROM meter_readings WHERE time > NOW() - INTERVAL '90 days' GROUP BY 1, 2) sub GROUP BY zone_name ORDER BY 3 DESC
